final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo for Varanasi Ganges morning ritual, capturing cultural documentary street photography.

Style/medium: documentary street photography, National Geographic editorial style, photorealistic
Composition: wide establishing shot at eye level, 35mm lens, layered depth with foreground bathers and background boats
Subject: devout Hindu worshippers performing morning ablutions in the Ganges, traditional attire, reverent postures, hands raised in prayer
Scene/backdrop: Varanasi ghats at dawn, ancient stone steps descending to the river, wooden boats drifting through morning mist
Lighting/mood: warm golden sunrise light filtering through haze, soft diffused glow, spiritual and serene atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and saffron tones from sunrise, muted blues and grays from mist, earth tones from stone ghats
Materials/textures: weathered stone surfaces, rippling water with light reflections, cotton fabric of traditional clothing, wooden boat hulls
Avoid: oversaturated HDR look, plastic skin textures, deformed hands, watermark, generic travel brochure aesthetic
